name: Daimaru Enawin Co., Ltd.
summary: Daimaru Enawin Co., Ltd. sells LP gas and petroleum products in Japan. The company's petroleum products include kerosene, and light and heavy oil. It also sells gas appliances, system kitchens, air conditioning equipment, home appliances, and solar systems; medical gases, home medical oxygen, and medical equipment; and industrial gases, welding and fusing equipment, welding materials, and industrial equipment. In addition, the company is involved in the mineral water home delivery services. Daimaru Enawin Co., Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
